name: cards
description: Shared mobile-aware card renderer (BeaconCards). Any blueprint listing related notes calls customJS.BeaconCards.render(dv, opts) instead of Dataview tables. Decoupled from Dataview semantics; caller supplies pages array. v0.1.1 ADDITIVE: adds icon/meta/layout options (layout="row" mirrors accuris Planning-Board card pattern: title+icon left, meta right, progress bar full-width).
